questions.question: How can ChatGPT help with creative writing?
options: Generate ideas, prompts, and outlines as a starting point

questions.question: What's a good way to use AI for personal projects?
options: Have AI do all the work
Use for planning, ideas, and step-by-step guidance
Avoid using AI for personal things

questions.question: Can AI help with creative problem-solving?
options: Yes, by generating unconventional ideas and perspectives

questions.question: How should you use AI-generated story ideas?
options: Use as inspiration and develop in your own voice
Never use AI for creative work

questions.question: What's the role of AI in content creation?
options: Helper for ideas, drafts, and overcoming blocks

questions.question: Can ChatGPT help plan home improvement projects?
options: Yes, for planning phases, budgets, and materials

questions.question: How can AI support habit building?
What makes AI useful for brainstorming?
options: Generates diverse ideas quickly to spark creativity

questions.question: Should you give ChatGPT credit for creative work?
options: Yes, be transparent when AI contributed significantly

questions.question: What's the best approach to AI-assisted creativity?
options: Use AI as a collaborator while maintaining your voice
